english translation text: AI SHIA YUN IMSHAB, SHAAME GHARIBAANASTO’SHIAS! TONIGHT IS THE NIGHT OF GHAREEBAN OF THE LONELY DESERTED STRANGERSEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
JISME HUSAYN URYAAN,ANDAR BIYA BAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text: THE NIGHT WHEN THE BODY OF HUSAYN (a.s.) IS LYING BARE IN THE DESERT OF KARBALAA

urdu transliteration text:
DAR KARBALA IM SHAB ZAARIYO AFGHAANAST,JISME ALI AKBAR,ANDAR BIYA BAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
TONIGHT THERE IS CRYING AND WAILING IN THE LAND OF KERBALA,
THE BODY OF ALI AKBAR IS LYING DESERTED ON THE GROUND

urdu transliteration text:
BAA HAALATE MAHZUUN,CHUN NAASHAH DARKHOON, BAR SHAHID UNHA,HAR CHASHME GIRYAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
LOOKING SORROWFULLY AT THE BODIES OF THEIR MARTYR,
DRENCHED IN BLOOD TEARS FLOWING FROM THEIR EYES

urdu transliteration text:
CHUN ZAINABE MAHZUN,BAADIDA E GIRYAAN,GUFT “AI BIRADAR JAAN, MAA BIKASO YAARIM”
@HujjatELC
english translation text: WHEN THE GRIEF STRICKEN ZAINAB SHEDDING TEARS PROFUSELY SAID, “O MY DEAR BROTHER! WE’RE LEFT WITHOUT ANY HELPER OR A FRIEND”

urdu transliteration text:
KHATME RASOOL AAYAD,BAA JUMLAE HAMRAAHN,AZ QATLE FARZANDASH,GIRYAANO NAALAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text: TONIGHT THE PROPHET HIMSELF, TOGETHER WITH HIS COMPANIONS ARE ALL WEEPING WITH GRIEF, ON THE BRUTAL MURDER OF HIS GRANDSON

urdu transliteration text:
ZAAKIR DAR UN MAJLIS,SIDDIKAE KUBRAASTAZ DAAGHE, FARZANDASH,BAA QALBE SUZAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE RECITER OF THE MAJLIS IS SIDDEEQAH  E KUBRAA (BIBI FATIMA) HERSELF,
ABLAZE IS HER HEART FOR THE MORTAL WOUND INFLICTED ON HER BELOVED SON

urdu transliteration text:
GUYAD KE AI BAABA,KUSHTAND HUSAINAM RAA,BINGAR CHI SHUD JISMASH,SAD CHAAKO URYAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
“O MY DEAR FATHER!”SHE SAYS; “THEY HAVE KILLED MY HUSAYN;
LOOK, WHAT HAS HAPPENED TO HIS BODY! IT IS LYING BARE WITH HUNDREDS OF WOUNDS AND STABS!”

urdu transliteration text:
AALE RASOOL IM SHAB,RUE ZAMIN KHAABAND,ZAINUL IBAAD AZ TAB,DAR AAHO AFGHANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
TONIGHT THE FAMILIES OF THE PROPHET ARE LYING ON THE PLAINS OF KERBALA,
ZAIN-UL-ABIDEEN WITH HIGH FEVER IS ALSO WEEPING AND WAILING

urdu transliteration text:
IM SHAB PUR KHOON,DAR ZIRE KHANJAARAH,YA KHAANAE KHOOLI, DAR KHAAKE SUZAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text: TONIGHT THE HEAD OF IMAM HUSSAIN, SMITTEN BY THE DAGGER AND COVERED IN BLOOD IS LYING ON THE DUSTY GROUND IN THE HOUSE OF KHOULI

urdu transliteration text:
IM SHAB PUR KHOON,DAR ZIRE KHANJAARAH,YA KHAANAE KHOOLI, DAR KHAAKE SUZAANAST
@HujjatELC
english translation text: TONIGHT THE (IMAAMS)HEAD, SMITTEN BY THE DAGGER AND COVERED IN BLOOD IS LYING ON THE DUSTY GROUND IN THE HOUSE OF KHOULI(KHOULI BIN YAZEED AL- ASBAHEE)
